items.title: Myles Garrett's Cleveland home is on the market for $2.1 million
items.summary: Usually, news of a player's home being put on the market is the spark for speculation that he may be looking for a new city in which to play.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: CA boss Greenberg 'open' to England-Australia Test in India
items.summary: "There are opportunities in India to put more content into certain areas," he says
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Man Utd handed Tchouameni boost - Friday's gossip
items.summary: Real Madrid open to selling Aurelien Tchouameni to Manchester United, Arsenal eye John Stones and Ezri Konsa, Chelsea favourites for Kerim Alajbegovic, Yan Diomande back on rada...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
